data.description: Casts a magical slumber upon 5 to 10 sleeping or unconscious creatures.
A magical energy reserve that a spellcaster can draw from to cast spells.

The target within range is duplicated, appearing as an exact duplicate of itself. The duplicate is an illusory creature that can move and take the place of the original, but it fades away if the spell ends or if a creature interacts with it. If a creature other than the original enters the area after the spell has ended, the creature must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or fall prone.
